headline: NYSE Content Update: Visa Announces Payments Partnership with OpenAI

headline: Assessing Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Intercontinental Exchange stock moves after recent performance Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) has drawn attention after its stock declined 11% over the past month and 12% year to date, while still showing a 31% total return over the past 3 years. See our latest analysis for Intercontinental Exchange.
